Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5014 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Force, The.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c200 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $c100 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Force, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $C100 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
The loading screen bitmap had some bad data, which caused some graphical errors at the bottom right hand corner. This has been corrected.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$C010 - $C7FF $CBF0 - $CFFF
